response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the role. Their background is entirely in web, mobile, and general software engineering with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive full-stack experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Experience with low-latency systems and performance-critical code in DLang
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of system architecture design for cloud infrastructure or hardware manufacturing
